mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYMENT_CANCEL ( CURRENT_TRX_NO, ORIGINAL_TRX_NO, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ, CANCEL_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{cancel.posTrx}, #{cancel.originalPosTrx}, #{cancel.originalAttemptSeq}, #{cancel.cancelStatus} ) RETURNING CURRENT_TRX_NO AS posTrx, ORIGINAL_TRX_NO AS originalPosTrx, ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ AS originalAttemptSeq, CANCEL_STATUS AS cancelStatus, CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO AS cancelApprovalNo, DECLINE_CODE AS declineCode;
mapper.select: SELECT A.FINAL_STATUS, A.APPROVAL_NO, A.DECLINE_CODE, A.CARD_BIN, A.CARD_LAST4, A.ATTEMPT_SEQ, A.AMOUNT FROM PAYMENT_ATTEMPT A WHERE A.POS_TRX = #{posTrx} AND A.ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{attemptSeq} LIMIT 1

SELECT C.POS_TRX, C.ORIGINAL_POS_TRX, C.ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ, C.CANCEL_STATUS, C.CANCEL_APPROVAL_NO, C.DECLINE_CODE FROM PAYMENT_CANCEL C WHERE C.ORIGINAL_POS_TRX = #{originalPosTrx} AND C.ORIGINAL_ATTEMPT_SEQ = #{originalAttemptSeq} LIMIT 1
